claimBoundary: desktop WebXR screenshot visual review only; not Quest, production, clinical, or scoring readiness
description: The XR view shows the Reom humanoid centered against a plain source-clean background. The source-backed CC0 shirt candidate appears as a broad flat teal panel across the torso rather than a fitted garment. The arms are lower than a T-pose but still stiff and mannequin-like, with hands hanging unnaturally. Face and hair remain low-detail and statue-like. No side UI or diagnostic panels are visible inside the screenshot crop.
progress: Pipeline progress is real: external CC0 source, provider gate, ingestion, WebXR comparator, and promotion gate all work. Visual realism has not improved enough because garment fit/transform is wrong.
nextRemediation: derive garment transform from body/garment bounds and regenerate source-backed candidate before another screenshot review
